description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, aerodynamic design with a fully enclosed body and sharp, angular lines. The front fairing is integrated with the wheel cover, giving it a streamlined appearance, while the rear section is compact and tapers upward. The wheels have a unique, stylized spoke pattern, and the side panels display a logo and the text 'XB47'. The handlebars are low and close to the body, suggesting a sport or concept bike style. The overall color is a matte dark blue or gray, with minimal visible mechanical components exposed.
description: A sleek, futuristic motorcycle with a fully enclosed, angular body and stylized wheels, finished in matte dark blue-gray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, streamlined fairing and integrated front wheel cover.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'XB47' logo, angular bodywork, and unique wheel design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact tail section and wide rear tire.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible engine casing and stylized rear wheel.
